meta.title: Reservations | Radice
meta.description: Book your table at Radice. Find information on our booking policies, dress code, and dietary accommodations.

data.headline: Reserve Your Table
data.content:
We welcome you to join us for an evening at Radice. Reservations are available up to 60 days in advance and are exclusively released online via the portal below. For parties larger than six, please inquire about our private dining options.

A placeholder for a booking widget like Tock or Resy would be embedded here.

items.title: Dietary Restrictions
items.content: We are pleased to accommodate most dietary restrictions with at least 48 hours advance notice. Please make a note at the time of booking. Unfortunately, we cannot guarantee accommodations for severe allergies or restrictions without prior notice.

items.title: Dress Code
items.content: Our dress code is smart elegant. We kindly request no shorts, t-shirts, or athletic wear. Jackets are recommended but not required for gentlemen.

items.title: Cancellation Policy
items.content: Due to the intimate nature of our restaurant, a fee of $100 per guest will be charged for cancellations made within 24 hours of the reservation time. We appreciate your understanding.
